title: Add SSRF protections to link preview
description: Harden link-preview endpoint with URL scheme validation, DNS/IP allow/deny controls, private-network blocking, redirects policy, and request size/time limits.
close_reason: Added URL validation, DNS/IP private-network blocking, and safe request limits for link preview

title: Sign and verify OAuth state payloads
description: Protect OAuth callback integrity for Slack, Meta, and LinkedIn by signing state, adding nonce and expiry, and rejecting tampered/expired payloads.
close_reason: Signed and verified OAuth state with expiry, user binding, and studio membership checks for Slack/Meta/LinkedIn

title: Harden studio membership authorization flow
description: Replace implicit studio ownership creation from client-supplied studio_id with explicit membership checks and controlled studio creation flow. Prevent privilege escalation by requiring invite/ownership validation before attaching studio context.
close_reason: Implemented membership enforcement in middleware and explicit team bootstrap endpoint

title: LinkedIn Community Management API application
description: Apply for the LinkedIn Community Management API product via the LinkedIn Developer Portal. Submit use-case description, company information, and integration details. Estimated 2–6 weeks. Required for LinkedIn publishing and page management.
notes: LinkedIn application packet prepared in DOCS/10-LinkedIn-Community-API-Application.md. Requires human submission in LinkedIn developer portal.

title: Submit Meta App Review
description: Submit review request for pages_manage_posts, pages_read_engagement, instagram_basic, instagram_content_publish, instagram_manage_insights. Respond to Meta reviewer questions. Estimated 2–4 weeks. Must be done before Facebook/Instagram can go live.
notes: Submission packet prepared in DOCS/09-Meta-App-Review-Assets.md. Awaiting human portal submission.

title: Prepare Meta App Review assets
description: Record screen-capture demo video showing each requested permission in use. Write privacy policy and data deletion instructions (required by Meta). Document data handling practices. These are required before App Review can be submitted.
close_reason: Prepared Meta app review assets packet with copy-ready scope rationale, Q&A, and evidence checklist

title: Build Meta developer app and sandbox
description: Create Meta developer app at developers.facebook.com. Configure OAuth redirect URIs. Set up test Facebook Page and Instagram Business account. Verify all permissions work in sandbox before submitting for review.
notes: Setup runbook prepared in DOCS/08-Meta-App-Sandbox-Setup.md. Requires human completion in Meta portal.

title: Slack publishing adapter
description: Adapter using chat.postMessage or chat.scheduleMessage. Supports plain text and Block Kit formatted messages. Handles image uploads via files.upload. Posts to specified channel in workspace.

title: Discord publishing adapter
description: Webhook-based adapter. Posts JSON body to stored webhook URL. Supports plain text, rich embeds (title/description/image/colour), and file attachments. Falls back to bot API if webhook is unavailable.

title: Bluesky publishing adapter
description: Adapter using AT Protocol. Creates app.bsky.feed.post records. Handles text, image blobs (uploadBlob → embed), and link card embeds. Manages session refresh on expiry.

title: LinkedIn publishing adapter
description: Adapter for LinkedIn personal profile and Company Page posts. Handles text, image (registerUpload → upload binary → post), and document uploads. Distinguishes person URN vs organisation URN.

title: Instagram publishing adapter
description: Adapter for Instagram Business/Creator accounts. Implements container-create → poll-until-ready → publish flow. Handles single image, carousel, and Reel variants. Returns platform_post_id.

title: Facebook publishing adapter
description: Adapter that takes a PostVariant and publishes to a Facebook Page. Handles text posts, image posts (upload then post), video posts (resumable upload). Returns platform_post_id on success.

title: node-cron scheduler loop
description: Cron job running every minute. Queries post_queue for due items (fire_at <= now, status=pending). Dispatches to correct platform adapter. Handles concurrent execution safely (row-level lock via SQLite transaction).

title: Post queue table and queue manager
description: Implement post_queue table (fire_at, attempts, status). Queue manager class with enqueue, dequeue, markDone, markFailed, requeueWithBackoff methods. Backoff: 5min, 30min, 2hrs.

title: Platform API Approvals
description: Non-code work to obtain production API access: Meta App Review for Facebook+Instagram, LinkedIn Community Management API application, and Discord bot verification.

title: Scheduling Engine
description: The backend job queue that fires posts at the right time. Includes platform publishing adapters for all six platforms, retry logic, and failure handling.

title: Complete TikTok assisted workflow UI
description: Add Compose UI to list TikTok assists for the newly created post and mark assists complete with resulting TikTok URL.
close_reason: Added TikTok assist list and mark-published controls in Compose with URL validation and refresh

title: Implement soft-archive model for content
description: Add archive metadata (archived_at/archived_by) for media, posts, and inbox entities; exclude archived items by default and support filtered retrieval.
close_reason: Implemented soft archive model for posts, inbox, and media with archive filtering and restore APIs

title: Enforce CSRF on unsafe API methods
description: Introduce global CSRF validation middleware for authenticated unsafe methods (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE), excluding explicit OAuth callback endpoints where needed.
close_reason: Added global CSRF middleware for unsafe /api methods with header/cookie token validation

title: Fail closed CORS in production
description: Update CORS policy to reject unknown origins when allowlist is missing in production, while keeping safe local-dev defaults.
close_reason: CORS now fails closed in production unless origin is explicitly allowlisted

title: Scheduled post quota enforcement
description: Track posts scheduled/published in the current billing month. Block new scheduling when quota is reached. Display remaining quota in composer and dashboard. Reset counter on billing cycle.

title: Connected account limit enforcement
description: Before connecting a new account, check current count against plan limit. Return 402 with quota details if exceeded. Surface in UI before and during account connection.

title: Plan tier definitions
description: Define four plan tiers in the database or config: Free (3 accounts, 1 user, 30 posts/month), Starter (6 accounts, 2 users, 150 posts/month), Studio (15 accounts, 5 users, 500 posts/month), Agency (unlimited). Map MediaFox limits into the BudgetFox entitlements system.

title: Immediate publish path
description: POST /posts/:id/publish endpoint. Bypasses queue and calls platform adapter directly. Still uses the retry/error handling logic. Returns synchronous result for UX (with timeout fallback to async if platform is slow).

title: Retry logic and dead-letter handling
description: On publish failure: increment attempts, calculate backoff delay, re-enqueue. After 3 failures mark status=dead. Create in-app notification for dead posts. Expose dead posts in UI with manual retry option.

title: Draft save and auto-save
description: Save button and auto-save every 30 seconds. Drafts persist in posts table with status=draft. Draft recovery prompt if browser closes mid-edit.

title: Media attachment with platform validation
description: File picker for images (JPEG/PNG/GIF/WebP), video (MP4), and documents (PDF for LinkedIn). Validate file type and size per platform limits. Show warnings for mismatches. Upload to media_assets on attach.

title: Personal vs company context switcher
description: Persistent UI control (always visible in composer header) that explicitly sets whether this post comes from the studio or from the user personally. Affects which accounts are available and whether approval workflow applies.

title: Platform and account selector
description: Checkbox list of available platforms with account picker per platform. If multiple accounts are connected for a platform (e.g., two LinkedIn profiles), allow selecting which to post from.

title: Composer text editor with platform character limits
description: Rich text input with live character counter. Counter updates per selected platform. Warn at 90%, block at limit. Platforms: LinkedIn (3000), Bluesky (300), Facebook (63,206), Discord (2000), Slack (4000).

title: Slack OAuth workspace install
description: Implement Slack OAuth 2.0 app install flow. Request chat:write, channels:read, channels:history scopes. Store bot token per workspace. Support multiple workspaces.

title: Discord Webhook connection
description: UI to paste a Discord webhook URL (created in Discord channel settings). Validate by sending a test message. Store URL encrypted. This enables publish-only Discord integration without a bot.

title: LinkedIn OAuth flow
description: Implement LinkedIn OAuth 2.0 redirect flow. Request w_member_social and r_basicprofile. Also support w_organization_social for Company Pages the user administers. Store 60-day access token with refresh.

title: Meta OAuth flow (Facebook + Instagram)
description: Implement Meta OAuth 2.0 redirect flow. Request pages_manage_posts, pages_read_engagement, instagram_basic, instagram_content_publish, instagram_manage_insights. Exchange code for long-lived token. Enumerate connected Pages and IG Business accounts.

title: Bluesky App Password connection flow
description: UI form to enter Bluesky handle + app password. Server calls /xrpc/com.atproto.server.createSession to obtain JWT. Store session token encrypted. No browser redirect needed.

title: Account model and CRUD API
description: Implement /api/accounts endpoints: list, connect initiation, disconnect, health check, force-refresh. Account model with encrypted token fields and status tracking.

title: Dockerfile and fox-suite docker-compose integration
description: Write multi-stage Dockerfile (server build, client build, slim runtime). Add mediafox service to fox-suite docker-compose.yml on port 5004. Include volume for SQLite data.

title: React + Vite client scaffold with routing
description: Scaffold the React/Vite/TypeScript client with React Router. Set up routes for all top-level screens (Dashboard, Compose, Calendar, Inbox, Analytics, Accounts, Team, Settings). Include shared layout shell with sidebar nav.

title: Token encryption service
description: Implement AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption helpers for storing OAuth access tokens and refresh tokens at rest. Per-studio key derived from a master secret env var.

title: Fox Suite studio context integration
description: Read studio_id from FoxAuth session. Scope all data access (accounts, posts, inbox, analytics) to the active studio. Support studio switching if user belongs to multiple studios.

title: FoxAuth session middleware integration
description: Wire in fox_auth JWT cookie validation from FoxAuth. Implement requireAuth and isAuthEnabled consistent with other Fox Suite apps. Support AUTH_DEV_BYPASS for Docker dev.

title: Design and apply SQLite database schema
description: Create and run migrations for all core tables: accounts, posts, post_variants, media_assets, inbox_items, approval_requests, post_queue. Use better-sqlite3.

title: Initialise Node.js/TypeScript/Express server
description: Scaffold the server with tsconfig, nodemon dev setup, Express app factory, and health endpoint. Mirror FoxAuth/BudgetFox structure.

title: BudgetFox Plan Gating
description: Enforce subscription tier limits: connected account caps, scheduled post quotas, feature flags (approval workflows, AI, bulk scheduling), and upgrade prompts.

title: Post Composer
description: The core content creation UI. Rich text editor with platform-aware limits, cross-posting, per-platform variant editing, media attachments, link previews, and draft saving.

title: Account Management
description: Connect and manage credentials for all six platforms. Covers OAuth flows, token encryption, refresh scheduling, and the account management UI.

title: Foundation & Infrastructure
description: Set up the server skeleton, database schema, auth integration, client scaffold, and Docker deployment. Everything else depends on this.

title: Wire UI for Google Photos YouTube and TikTok workflows
description: Add client UI surfaces for newly implemented backend integrations: Google Photos media import, YouTube channel/publish actions, and TikTok assisted publish tracking.
close_reason: Wired UI for Google Photos import, YouTube publish from media assets, and TikTok assisted handoff creation

title: Build cross-channel campaign attribution analytics
description: Add campaign-level attribution and per-asset performance rollups across connected channels with comparable metrics and trend views.
close_reason: Added cross-channel campaign attribution endpoint and analytics UI rollup by campaign

title: Integrate YouTube and Shorts publishing
description: Add YouTube channel auth and publishing support for videos/shorts with title/description/tags and status tracking.
close_reason: Implemented YouTube/Shorts backend integration with channel listing and direct resumable video publish from Media Library assets

title: Integrate TikTok Business publishing
description: Add TikTok Business account connection and publishing pipeline with capability checks, media constraints validation, and failure diagnostics.
close_reason: Implemented TikTok assisted publishing workflow with handoff and completion tracking endpoints

title: Add Google Photos media import integration
description: Build Google Photos read/import connector with album selection, pagination, quota-aware sync, and dedupe by source ID/hash into Media Library.
close_reason: Implemented backend Google Photos integration with album/media listing, pagination, import caps, and dedupe by source ID/hash

title: Add restore and retention purge workflows
description: Implement restore endpoints and configurable retention policies with scheduled purge jobs and audit logging for archived content lifecycle.
close_reason: Added restore endpoints and daily retention purge workflow for archived posts, inbox, and media

title: Modernize LinkedIn OAuth scopes and permissions
description: Review and update LinkedIn scopes/products to currently supported APIs, including backward-compatible migration and user-facing errors for missing app permissions.
close_reason: Updated LinkedIn scopes to modern configurable defaults and added profile/userinfo fallback with clearer OAuth error details

title: Upgrade prompts and limit-reached UI
description: When a user hits a plan limit, show a contextual upgrade modal rather than a bare error. Link to BudgetFox billing page for the studio. Include a brief feature comparison of current vs next tier.

title: Feature flag enforcement
description: Gate approval workflows, bulk CSV scheduling, AI features, analytics export, and advanced inbox behind plan tiers. Return 402 or show upgrade prompt. Use the isAuthEnabled/quota pattern from BudgetFox.

title: Approval queue UI
description: Dedicated Approvals page (visible to Manager/Owner only). List of pending posts with submitter, submitted date, target platforms. Click to open full composer preview in read-only mode with Approve/Reject actions.

title: Approve and reject (manager flow)
description: Manager sees pending post in Approval Queue. Can preview all platform variants. Approve (with optional note) → post enters schedule queue. Reject (with required note) → post returns to draft, editor notified.

title: Submit for approval (editor flow)
description: Editor clicks Submit for Approval. Post status changes to pending_approval. Approval request created and assigned to all Managers/Owners. In-app notification and email sent to reviewers.

title: Approval requests table and state machine
description: Implement approval_requests table. States: pending → approved | rejected | withdrawn. Only one pending approval per post at a time. Rejected posts return to draft. Approved posts enter the publish/schedule queue.

title: Team invite flow
description: Owner/Manager can invite by email. Generate signed invite token (24hr expiry). Invited user clicks link, creates/links FoxAuth account, joins studio with assigned role. Invite list shows pending invites with revoke option.

title: Team roles model and RBAC
description: Implement studio_members table with roles: owner, manager, editor, viewer. Enforce role checks on all API routes (post creation, publishing, approval, account management, analytics export). Owner is set on studio creation.

title: Cross-platform analytics dashboard
description: Overview dashboard: total reach, total engagement, total posts published for selected date range. Stacked bar chart of post volume by platform. Side-by-side engagement rate per platform. Follower growth comparison.

title: Per-account metrics and follower growth
description: Account detail analytics page: follower count over time (line chart), average engagement rate over time, post frequency, top 5 posts by engagement rate. Date range selector (7d / 30d / 90d / 12m).

title: Per-post analytics UI
description: Post detail analytics panel: impressions, reach, engagement rate, clicks, shares — per platform variant. Date of publish, time-to-first-engagement. Accessible from Calendar post modal and post list.

title: LinkedIn analytics sync
description: Sync ugcPost analytics (impressions, clicks, reactions, shares) via LinkedIn API. Sync Company Page follower analytics. Store in metrics tables.

title: Facebook and Instagram Insights sync
description: Sync Page Insights and IG Business Insights via Graph API. Fetch per-post metrics and account-level metrics (daily). Store in post_metrics and account_metrics tables.

title: Analytics data model and ingestion pipeline
description: Design analytics tables: post_metrics (impressions, reach, clicks, reactions, shares, per variant, per day), account_metrics (followers, following, per account, per day). Build ingestion pipeline that syncs platform data on schedule.

title: Reply from inbox
description: Reply input at the bottom of the conversation thread. Routes reply through the correct platform adapter (comment reply on Facebook/Instagram/LinkedIn, post reply on Bluesky, message send on Discord/Slack).

title: Inbox UI
description: Three-panel inbox UI. Left: filter sidebar (platform, account, status, assigned-to-me). Centre: chronological message list with platform icon and author. Right: conversation thread with full message body and context.

title: Slack channel message listener
description: Use Slack Events API (HTTP push) to receive message.channels events. Requires Slack app configured with event subscriptions pointing to MediaFox webhook endpoint. Upsert into inbox_items.

title: Discord bot Gateway listener
description: Discord bot connects via WebSocket Gateway and listens for MESSAGE_CREATE events in monitored channels. New messages from non-bot users upserted into inbox_items. Requires MESSAGE_CONTENT privileged intent.

title: Instagram comments poller
description: Poll Instagram Graph API for comments on Business account media. Map to inbox_items. Note: Instagram DMs not available via API.

title: Facebook Page comments poller
description: Poll Graph API for comments on managed Page posts. Includes comment replies. Map to inbox_items. Handle pagination via cursor.

title: LinkedIn comments and mentions poller
description: Poll LinkedIn API for comments on studio-managed posts. Map to inbox_items with author, body, and parent post reference. Handle pagination.

title: Bluesky mentions and replies poller
description: Background job polling /xrpc/app.bsky.notification.listNotifications for mentions, replies, and quote posts. Upsert new items into inbox_items. Track cursor to avoid re-processing.

title: inbox_items table and sync API
description: Implement inbox_items schema. Build /api/inbox endpoints: list (with platform/status/account filters), update status/assignment, add internal note. Sync pipeline runs on schedule and on-demand.

title: Post detail modal
description: Click a calendar pill to open a modal with: post body preview per platform, scheduled time, status, publish results per variant, and quick-action buttons (edit, reschedule, cancel, duplicate).

title: Platform colour-coded post pills
description: Posts appear as pills on the calendar coloured by platform (e.g., LinkedIn blue, Bluesky cyan, Discord indigo). Multi-platform posts show stacked pills. Status-coded: scheduled/published/failed.

title: Calendar component (month/week/day)
description: Build calendar UI component with three view modes. Month: post count chips per day. Week: time-slotted view with post pills. Day: full timeline. Navigation controls and today button.

title: Link preview card
description: Detect URLs in post body. Fetch Open Graph metadata server-side. Display link card preview (title, description, thumbnail) in composer. Allow user to remove the card.

title: Per-platform variant editing
description: Toggle to switch from single shared post body to per-platform editing mode. Each platform gets its own text editor pre-populated with the shared copy, then independently editable. Character limits apply individually.

title: Account management UI
description: Accounts page showing all connected accounts grouped by platform and type (personal/company). Status indicators (active/expiring/expired/error). Connect/disconnect buttons. Account health detail panel.

title: Token refresh scheduler
description: Background cron job that checks for expiring tokens (within 7 days) and proactively refreshes them. Mark accounts as expired on 401 response. Surface warnings in UI.

title: Discord Bot OAuth and server join
description: Implement Discord OAuth2 bot invite flow. Bot joins the user's server and gains access to specified channels. Required for inbox (reading messages) and richer posting capabilities.

title: Rate-limit budget middleware
description: Platform-specific middleware that tracks API call counts per account per platform per window. Returns remaining budget. Blocks calls and queues for retry when limit reached. Needed before any platform adapter is built.

title: Team & Approval Workflows
description: Role-based access (owner/manager/editor/viewer), email invites, draft submission, approve/reject workflow, approval queue UI, and full audit log.

title: Analytics
description: Per-post and per-account performance metrics, cross-platform dashboard, follower growth trends, export, and AI-powered best-time-to-post recommendations.

title: Unified Inbox
description: Aggregate comments, mentions, replies, and messages from all connected platforms into one inbox with filtering, assignment, internal notes, and reply capability.

title: Calendar View
description: Visual month/week/day calendar showing all scheduled and published posts. Drag-to-reschedule, per-platform colour coding, and post detail modal.

title: Explore Steam community publishing integration
description: Investigate Steam Community publishing/scheduling options for studio announcements and determine viable integration strategy.
close_reason: Added Steam community integration feasibility with assisted-vs-direct publish strategy and go/no-go recommendation

title: Evaluate X and Threads integration feasibility
description: Assess API access, pricing, terms, and technical approach for X and Threads; produce go/no-go recommendation and implementation plan.
close_reason: Added X vs Threads feasibility report with go/no-go recommendation and phased delivery approach

title: Add Reddit assisted publishing workflow
description: Provide subreddit-aware composition workflow with policy checks and assisted/manual publish tracking, including outbound engagement links.
close_reason: Implemented Reddit assisted publish workflow with handoff records and completion tracking

title: Design Apple ecosystem media ingest path
description: Define and implement Apple-friendly media ingest strategy (enhanced upload/mobile capture/shared link import), with architecture doc and phased delivery plan.
close_reason: Added Apple media ingest phase plan and implemented HEIC/HEIF/MOV upload support

title: Discord bot verification (for 100+ servers)
description: If MediaFox bot is installed on 100+ Discord servers, Discord requires verification and intent review for MESSAGE_CONTENT privileged intent. Prepare bot description, privacy policy, and use-case justification. Submit via Discord Developer Portal.
notes: Verification prep checklist prepared in DOCS/11-Discord-Bot-Verification-Plan.md. Requires Discord portal submission.

title: Hashtag recommendations
description: Analyse post body and suggest relevant hashtags. Use Claude API to extract key themes and map to common hashtags per platform. LinkedIn hashtags, Instagram hashtags, Bluesky tags. Show as clickable chips the user can toggle on/off.

title: AI caption draft suggestions
description: Composer 'AI Draft' button. Send topic/brief to Claude API (claude-sonnet-4-6). Return platform-aware draft variants (respecting character limits per platform). User can accept, edit, or discard. Gated to Starter plan and above.

title: Best-time-to-post analysis engine
description: Server-side analysis of post_metrics grouped by hour/day-of-week per account. Identify windows with historically highest engagement rate. Expose as GET /api/analytics/best-times/:accountId. Require minimum 30 data points.

title: Email notifications
description: Send transactional email on: post published (summary), post failed (with error reason), approval requested (to reviewers), approval resolved (to submitter), token expiring (7 days warning). Use a simple SMTP/SES integration. HTML templates.

title: In-app notification UI
description: Bell icon in nav bar with unread badge count. Dropdown panel listing recent notifications with icons, timestamps, and relative time. Click to navigate to relevant context. Mark-all-read button.

title: In-app notification model and API
description: notifications table: recipient_user_id, type, title, body, link, read, created_at. GET /api/notifications (paginated), POST /api/notifications/:id/read. Types: post_published, post_failed, approval_requested, approval_resolved, token_expiring.

title: Asset picker in composer
description: Media attachment button in composer opens a modal asset picker. Browse and search the content library. Select one or multiple assets to attach to the current post. Upload new asset directly from the picker.

title: Content library UI
description: Grid view of assets with thumbnail, filename, tags, and upload date. List/grid toggle. Detail panel on click: preview, metadata, tags editor, delete button, 'Use in post' button.

title: Asset tagging and search
description: Tag assets with freeform labels. Full-text search on filename and tags. Filter by mime type (image/video/document). Sort by date, name, size.

title: Media upload API and storage
description: POST /api/media endpoint. Accept multipart upload. Validate file type and size. Store on local filesystem under /data/media/{studio_id}/. Record in media_assets table. Generate thumbnail for images.

title: Audit log
description: Record all significant events: post published, post failed, post approved, post rejected, account connected/disconnected, team member added/removed, role changed. Store in audit_events table. Viewable by Owner in Settings.

title: Best-time-to-post AI recommendations
description: Analyse historical post_metrics for each account to identify hours/days with highest engagement rate. Surface as a suggested posting time in the composer's schedule picker. Requires at least 30 posts of data per account to activate.

title: Export analytics (CSV and PDF)
description: Export button on analytics dashboard and per-account pages. CSV: raw metrics table. PDF: formatted report with charts (rendered server-side or client-side with html-to-pdf). Date range and platform filter respected.

title: Discord and Slack metrics
description: Count reactions (Discord) and emoji reactions (Slack) on published posts. Count thread reply counts. Store in post_metrics. These are engagement proxies, not reach/impressions.

title: Bluesky engagement sync
description: Poll Bluesky for like counts, reply counts, and repost counts on managed posts. Bluesky does not have follower analytics via public API — log what is available.

title: Assignment, notes, and resolved state
description: Assign inbox item to a team member (with notification). Add internal note visible only to team. Mark as resolved. Filter by these states. Resolved items archived but searchable.

title: Personal/company filter and empty-slot suggestions
description: Toggle to filter calendar between Company posts, Personal posts, or both. Show contextual prompt on empty days/slots: 'No posts scheduled on Thursday — add one?'

title: Drag-to-reschedule
description: Drag a post pill to a new time slot to reschedule it. Triggers PUT /posts/:id with updated scheduled_at. Confirmation prompt if dragging a post that is within 1 hour of publish time.

title: Post duplication and repurpose
description: Duplicate an existing published or draft post to create a new draft pre-populated with the same content. Useful for recurring content formats.

title: Platform preview pane
description: Side panel showing a realistic render of how the post will appear on each selected platform. Tabs per platform. Uses actual character limits, font sizes, and layout conventions for each platform.

title: AI Features
description: Best-time-to-post analysis, AI caption drafts (Claude API), hashtag suggestions, and long-form content repurposing into social snippets.

title: Notifications
description: In-app notification bell, email alerts for publish success/failure/approval events, daily/weekly digest, and outbound webhook for automation.

title: Content Library
description: Shared media asset store — upload, tag, search, and reuse images/video across posts. Includes optional ADCFox integration for existing brand assets.

title: Long-form to social snippet repurposing
description: Paste or link to a blog post or article. Claude API extracts key points and generates platform-specific social posts (LinkedIn article summary, Bluesky thread, Discord announcement). Output as a draft multi-platform post ready to review.

title: Outbound webhook notifications
description: Allow studios to register a webhook URL. On publish events and failures, POST a structured JSON payload. Useful for n8n/Zapier automation or custom integrations.

title: Email digest (daily and weekly)
description: Opt-in daily or weekly summary email: posts published, engagement highlights, inbox items received. Configurable in user Settings. Scheduled via cron.

title: ADCFox asset integration
description: Optional import from ADCFox (Fox Suite documentation/asset tool). API call to ADCFox to list available brand assets. Import selected assets into the MediaFox content library. Requires ADCFox API integration agreement.
